title: Max Bramer
text: Home * People * Max Bramer Max Bramer [1] Max A. Bramer , a British computer scientist and emeritus professor of Information Technology at the University of Portsmouth . Former appointments include lecturer in Computer Science at the Open University , Milton Keynes . His research interests include Data mining and formerly the application of declarative knowledge of chess endgames with a small number of pieces like KPK .
